data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for overtime calculations.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Overtime calculations (time-and-a-half after 8 hours)', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. While the linked use case mentions overtime rates, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. This indicates a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No explicit validation of overtime calculations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the overtime calculations.
